label: Desired: fold bottom up · Actual: oscillates between tasks
caption: The robot oscillates between the fold bottom up and fold right arm tasks before correctly committing to the fold bottom up task.

label: Desired: fold bottom up · Actual: fold right arm
caption: Rather than grabbing the bottom right of the sweater, the robot hesitates about the desired task and is "distracted" by the right sleeve. The robot ultimately decides to fold the right sleeve instead.

label: Desired: fold bottom up · Actual: right correct, left to sleeve
caption: The robot correctly lifts the bottom right of the sweater. However, the left arm gets "distracted" by the left sleeve and goes to grab it instead of the bottom left of the sweater.

label: Desired: fold left arm · Actual: fold bottom up
caption: Rather than folding the left arm, the robot decides to fold the bottom of the sweater up instead.
